reviews.review_description: I was just playing the game, then out of no where someone with the "owner" badge and a ban hammer comes out from mall and bans me from the game. I doubt it was the owner because I feel like the owner wouldn't abuse his power. Please unban me. This game has very good potential

reviews.review_title: I am the co-owner leaving a review
reviews.review_description: This game is probably one of the best fan games You can actually get very high quality there is a horror mode a mall, a movie theater and a staff/fan room it’s basically just the staffs fan art and the one made by GTVR5897 is mine W game!!!

This game has the best quality if ever seen in a game like this better than gorilla tags quality it has horror mode shop staff art and beach get this game and have fun thank you for making the best game ever
I’m mod /trial mod I’m leaving a review because I’m bored idk get the game

developer_response.body: thx man this is the owner (unknown)
